name: Rimini Street, Inc.
summary: PART I Business Overview Rimini Street, Inc. and its subsidiaries (referred to as Rimini Street, the Company, we and us) are global providers of end-to-end third-party enterprise software support, managed services and Agentic AI ERP innovation solutions. Rimini Street, Inc. was formed in the State of Nevada in 2005 and, through a merger in 2017 with a public company, became Rimini Street, Inc., a Delaware corporation, trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol RMNI.
